race.comment: KIRKSVILLE (6) is racing well, scoring by 1.2 lengths two back at Gatton then finishing a respectable fourth last time over 1200m at Warwick when not too far away. Should be poised just off the lead and is expected to be in the finish. GOODES (1) missed the placings two runs back then settled well back last start when 8 lengths away in ninth over 1100m at Ipswich. Beautifully placed against this line-up and is sure to take a ton of beating. AMERICAN CONQUEST (5) improved second-up last start but found a couple better over 1100m at this circuit, beaten 2.5 lengths. Suitably placed so he can figure again. I AM A WINNER (2) finished off strongly when beaten 1.5 lengths last time at Warwick. Worth including again.
